mapper.select: select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, (select dept_name from sys_dept where dept_id = d.parent_id) parent_name from sys_dept d where d.dept_id = #{deptId}
select count(1) from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{deptId} limit 1
select * from sys_dept where instr(',' || ancestors || ',', ',' || #{deptId} || ',') > 0
select count(*) from sys_dept where status = 0 and del_flag = '0' and instr(',' || ancestors || ',', ',' || #{deptId} || ',') > 0

select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time from sys_dept d where d.dept_name=#{deptName} and d.parent_id = #{parentId} and d.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update:
update sys_dept set status = '0' where dept_id in
#{deptId}
